detail.description:
◆Enjoy pretend play, educational games, and real-world experiences, all completely free!

◆Learn and Play for Free! An Educational App for Kids
→GokkoWorld is a free, interactive app where kids can explore different careers through games and play original educational games.

[Recommended Age] 2 and up

◆GokkoWorld Features

- Designed with simple controls so even 2-year-olds can play.
- Educational elements like numbers and new vocabulary are woven throughout the gameplay.
